name: dexthemes
description: Discover, create, preview, apply, collect, and publish Codex themes with DexThemes.

interface.shortDescription: Discover and create themes for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Browse official, DexThemes, and community palettes; turn an idea or voice request into a named theme; compare full Codex workspace mockups; use an explicit import handoff; publish with confirmation; and track all-period ranks, repeat wins, and achievement themes.
defaultPrompt: Create a Codex theme inspired by me.
Show me three dark community themes.
What have I unlocked in DexThemes?
